name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-7
title: No test verifies invariant 1 (resolve-scope.py emits stdout only, never calls Agent)
description: Spec invariant 1 says 'resolve-scope.py emits a prompt to stdout only; it never calls Agent itself'. No test asserts this. Add a test that greps resolve-scope.py for forbidden patterns like Agent invocation, claude API calls, or subprocess to dispatch tools. Currently if someone added Agent dispatch inside resolve-scope.py, no test would catch it.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3 PR. BUG-21 hardcoded names removed; BUG-28 defensive .get() for optional keys; BUG-7/9/12/14/17 covered by new test-invariant-coverage.py.
